title: Bring Your Own IP (BYOIP)
description: Import your own public IP addresses and use them on eligible OVHcloud services.
rir_selection_title: Select your RIR - Regional Internet Registry
rir_selection_description: Select the RIR that manages your public IP addresses.
rir_selection_RIPE_description: Regional Internet Registry for Europe, the Middle East, and Central Asia
region_selection_description: A campus is the set of data centres where you can move your IP addresses. The list of data centres that make up a campus is displayed below. You must select the campus where your services will be located.
region_token_description: To validate that you are indeed the owner of the IP address range you want to import, you must update the whois entry of your range using the token below. The token must appear in a specific field of the whois object (see below), on a dedicated line. The token must be added before making the command, and must remain in place until the service is delivered.
region_token_description_1: For RIPE, edit the "descr" field of the "inetnum" object of the IP address.
region_token_description_2: For ARIN, edit the "Public Comments" field of the "Network" object.
region_token_description_3: For APNIC, edit the "remarks" field of the "inetnum" object (or the 'aut-num' object when used as a number).
ip_range_selection_description: Indicate the range of IP addresses you want to import (the size of the range must be between /19 and /24). If the size of the range is greater than /24, the address range will be segmented into a contiguous set of /24 sized ranges.
ip_byoip_as_system_description: Choose the AS with which to announce your IP address block on the Internet
ip_byoip_as_rir_title: Select the RIR that manages your AS number
ip_byoip_disclaimer_description_point_1: To be the owner of the specified IP address range.
ip_byoip_disclaimer_description_point_2: To commit to ensuring that the specified IP address range is not announced on the Internet by multiple networks simultaneously (multi-homing)
ip_byoip_disclaimer_description_point_3: To have a healthy reputation on this IP address range
ip_byoip_disclaimer_ordering_delay_messa: Please note that this process may take approximately 3 weeks. We apologise for this inconvenience.
